title: Large angle elastic scattering of 3He.

x4freetext: detected by telescope consisted of a thin ionization
chamber (detector of specific energy loss dE/dx) and a
silicon diffusely drift counter with the thickness
(96% enrichment) with the thickness of 1-2 mg/cm2 were
manufactured from separated isotopes by vacuum
evaporation. Aluminium target was produced from an
ordinary foil. Silicon target was a thin (~ 0.5 mg/cm2)
carbon film with a layer (~ 0.5 mg/cm2) of natural
Absolute error generally was no more
